Yang Zong (Chubo) жҘҠз¶ң (еҲқдјҜ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Zong (жҘҠз¶ң), styledChubo (еҲқдјҜ). Warned Cao Shuang not to give up authority. Yang Zong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
